AS350B2*

*available only in Haida Gwaii/Prince Rupert bases
Passengers – 5
Cabin Volume – 105.94 cu ft
Payload (w/full fuel) – 1040 lbs
Payload (w/ one hour fuel) – 1500 lbs
Nominal Sling Load – 2200 lbs
Cruise Speed – 120 knots
Max Range (w/Full Fuel) – 320 nautical miles
Fuel Capacity – 540 litres
Endurance – 2.7 hours (with VFR reserve)
Fuel Consumption – 172 litres per hour
Exterior Cargo Basket available
Air medical (Lifeport) single patient transfer capable

Pilatus PC-12

Configurations – corporate passenger – 2 – 8 seats
Cabin Volume – 356 cu ft
Cabin Width – max 5′ 0″
Cabin Height – 4′ 9″
Cabin Length – 16′ 18″
Passengers – 6 or 8 (corporate configuration)
Baggage Volume – 40 cu ft/150 cu ft in 4 passenger configuration
Max Takeoff Weight – 10450 lbs
Max Payload (useful load) – 2257 lbs
Cruise Speed – 499kmh
Max Range (w/Full Fuel) –3218km
Fuel Capacity –_2704 litres
Fuel Consumption = 270 litres per hour
